articles.title: Binance NFT Announces Integration With Polygon Network
articles.description: Users will now be able to buy, deposit, withdraw and list NFTs from the Polygon network on the Binance NFT marketplace.

articles.title: Binance Adds Polygon Support for NFT Marketplace
articles.description: Binance has expanded its non-fungible token (NFT) ecosystem with the addition of the Polygon chain. But it only supports selected collections.
